name: Cheese Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine mustard powder and seasonings with the flour and mix well.
3. Cut butter into the flour mixture until fully incorporated.
4. Add grated cheese to the flour and mix well.
5. Gradually add cold water, kneading for a short time until dough forms a ball.
6. Divide dough into quarters.
7. Roll out each quarter very thin (about 1/8 inch).
8. Cut into crackers using a sharp knife or pizza cutter.
9. Prick the tops of the crackers with a fork.
10. Place crackers on a greased baking sheet in a single layer.
11. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
12. Remove from oven and let cool completely before storing in an airtight container overnight.
